recs.title: Recommendations
recs.none: Nothing to improve in this category.

a11y.noViolations: No violations detected by automated checks.
a11y.machineNote: Automated checks cover a subset of WCAG criteria. A clean result does not certify full compliance; manual review is still required for the rest.

vitals.labNote: Lab measurement of this preview render. Values are directional and differ from real-user (field) data.

slowLcp.title: Main content renders slowly
slowLcp.detail: Compress or preload the hero image / largest block so visitors see the main content sooner.

highCls.title: Layout shifts while loading
highCls.detail: Reserve space for images, embeds and late-loading blocks so the page does not jump under the reader.

slowTtfb.title: Slow server response (TTFB)
slowTtfb.detail: The HTML itself is slow to arrive: enable page caching or review server load before optimizing anything else.

missingDims.title: {{count}} images without width/height attributes
missingDims.detail: Add width and height so the browser reserves the space up front - this is the most common cause of layout shifts.

oversizedImages.title: {{count}} images heavier than needed
oversizedImages.detail: The source file is more than twice its displayed size. Upload resized variants or let Jahia serve smaller renditions.

heavyPage.title: Heavy page ({{size}})
heavyPage.detail: Compress images and remove unused scripts/styles to reduce total download weight, especially for mobile visitors.

manyRequests.title: {{count}} network requests
manyRequests.detail: Combine or drop resources and lazy-load below-the-fold content: each request adds latency.

largeDom.title: Large DOM ({{count}} nodes)
largeDom.detail: Simplify the markup or split very long pages: a large DOM slows rendering and every interaction.

heavyAssets.title: {{count}} very large files (e.g. {{name}})
heavyAssets.detail: Minify, compress or split these assets, or load them only where actually used.

readability.h1Hint: a page should have exactly one H1
readability.headingSkipsHint: avoid jumping levels (e.g. H2 to H4)
readability.noText: Not enough text on this page to compute readability ({{count}} words found).

veryHardText.title: Text is very difficult to read (score {{score}})
veryHardText.detail: Shorten sentences and prefer everyday words. Aim for a score above 50 for a general audience.

hardText.title: Text is difficult to read (score {{score}})
hardText.detail: Shorten the longest sentences and replace jargon: a score of 50-70 suits most website visitors.

longSentences.title: {{count}} sentences longer than 25 words
longSentences.detail: Split them - one idea per sentence. Long sentences are the main driver of a poor readability score.

longParagraphs.title: Dense paragraphs ({{count}} words on average)
longParagraphs.detail: Break paragraphs up: 40-60 words per paragraph reads comfortably on screen.

h1Count.title: {{count}} H1 headings on the page
h1Count.detail: Use exactly one H1: it anchors the page for readers, screen readers and search engines.

headingSkips.title: {{count}} skipped heading levels
headingSkips.detail: Do not jump levels (e.g. H2 straight to H4): fix the hierarchy so the document outline stays meaningful.

thinContent.title: Little text on the page ({{count}} words)
thinContent.detail: Pages under ~300 words inform and rank poorly. Consider expanding the content or merging it elsewhere.
